channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Geology can make the risks of solar storms 1000 times worse': Below the US is a 200-kilometer-thick lost continent that could put data centers at risk by making strained electrical grids even worse
item.description: Scientists discovered a buried geological structure beneath eastern America that could amplify solar storm damage to power grids and infrastructure

item.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
